description: Inspired by the clog, this Wild Rock sandal from clarks has a fashionable look. Designed in the natural shape of the foot to provide incredible comfort, it has a casually sporty look, making it a perfect addition to your wardrobe of casual footwear.UpperFull supple-soft leather upper with cut out panels on the lateral forefoot for breathable comfortAnkle strap for enhanced support with tang clasp on the lateral side to lock the foot in placeToe box foxing in leather for enhanced durabilityCork footbed for all-day comfortOutsoleDurable EVA outsole with textured panels to enhance grip and comfortFlex grooves in the forefoot and the heel area to further add to grip and tractionshoe CareClean the leather with a leather brushDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
